creator: mwlucas@blackhelicopters.org
text:
IMHO this falls into that gray area between docs and src.  I'm lumping
it in into the -doc category, but feel free to shunt this off to a
more correct person/category/whatever.

With the addition of the IT translations, the example given in
refuse.README no longer blocks all foreign -doc translations.  The
following patch corrects the sample.

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the given example to block out translations, and sup.
